title: Method names should comply with a naming convention
description: This rule enforces a consistent naming convention for methods to improve readability and maintainability.
message: Method name does not comply with the naming convention.
recommendation: Follow a consistent method naming convention.

noncompliant.description: Method name does not follow the naming convention.

compliant.description: Method name follows the naming convention.

why_is_this_an_issue: Inconsistent method naming can make code harder to read and understand.
how_to_fix: Rename the method to follow the chosen naming convention.

metadata.title: Method names should comply with a naming convention
